events.text: Yasuyuki Konno (Japan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Japan 0, Colombia 1. Juan Cuadrado (Colombia) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the centre of the goal.
Goal!  Japan 1, Colombia 1. Shinji Okazaki (Japan) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Keisuke Honda with a cross.
Goal!  Japan 1, Colombia 2. Jackson Martínez (Colombia) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by James Rodríguez.
Fredy Guarín (Colombia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Japan 1, Colombia 3. Jackson Martínez (Colombia) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by James Rodríguez   following a fast break.
Goal!  Japan 1, Colombia 4. James Rodríguez (Colombia) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Adrián Ramos with a through ball.
